profile.name: Abhishek Pawar
profile.title: Data Analyst
profile.subtitle: A Data Analyst
profile.bio: I am Abhishek Pawar, a passionate and results-driven Data Analyst with hands-on experience in data analytics and business intelligence. Currently working at Ingenero Technologies as a Data Analyst Intern, I specialize in analyzing complex datasets, building automated workflows using IBM BPM, and generating actionable business insights for process optimization. I thrive on transforming raw data into clear, data-driven decisions that create measurable impact across any domain.

description: Analyzed large-scale business and operational data for petroleum, gas, and energy sector clients using Microsoft SQL Server and Python, enabling data-driven decision making.
Developed and optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and views to support data pipelines and seamless workflow integrations.
Designed and implemented end-to-end workflows in IBM BPM, automating critical business processes and improving system efficiency.
Performed data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory data analysis (EDA) using RapidMiner for advanced analytics use cases.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver process optimization solutions and improve data accuracy across enterprise systems.

experience.company: Data Science & Analytics Club, AITR Indore
description: Actively participated in multiple national-level hackathons, enhancing problem-solving, innovation, and teamwork skills.
Served as a core team member of the Data Science and Analytics Club, organizing events and contributing to analytics-driven initiatives.
Facilitated technical sessions on Python, SQL, and machine learning fundamentals, helping peers build foundational analytics skills.
Managed event logistics, speaker coordination, and promotional campaigns to maximize attendance and engagement across multiple events.
Acted as a liaison between students, faculty, and industry professionals to promote data analytics awareness and career development opportunities.

education.institution: Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research, Indore

projects.title: Business Process Automation & Analytics Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-scale internal applications focused on automating business workflows and improving operational efficiency for petrochemical and industrial plants. Designed end-to-end workflows using IBM BPM, optimized SQL Server queries, performed data analysis using Python and RapidMiner, and integrated Power BI dashboards for stakeholder reporting.

projects.title: GreenDrive Analytics — EV Sustainability BI Platform
projects.description: Engineered an EV sustainability and BI platform using Python, SQL, PostgreSQL, Power BI, and Prophet to analyze EV adoption, TCO savings, carbon reduction, and infrastructure trends across India. Designed a PostgreSQL STAR-schema data warehouse with ETL pipelines processing 20K+ records and Prophet-based forecasting models to predict EV growth till 2030.

projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard — Power BI
projects.description: Constructed a real-time sales dashboard using SQL for data extraction and Power BI for visualization, tracking performance across 100+ products. Formulated SQL queries to process and analyze over 1 million records, improving data accuracy by 20%. Designed interactive dashboards monitoring sales trends, regional performance, and product profitability for 5+ regions.

projects.title: G-Z Fashion Recommendation System
projects.description: Built a fashion recommendation system using Python and OpenCV to suggest outfits based on user preferences and visual features. Implements content-based filtering and image similarity matching.

projects.title: Music Store Data Analysis — SQL
projects.description: Comprehensive SQL-based analysis of a music store database. Wrote complex queries involving joins, subqueries, aggregations, and window functions to extract business insights on sales, customer behavior, and inventory.

projects.title: Real-Time Object Detection
projects.description: Real-time object detection system using Python and deep learning. Leverages pre-trained models to detect and classify objects from live video feed with bounding box visualization and confidence scores.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website to showcase projects, skills, and experience. Features responsive design, dynamic content loading from JSON, project filtering, dark mode, and a clean user-friendly interface.

projects.title: StockMate — Stock Analysis Platform
projects.description: A stock analysis and tracking platform built with TypeScript. Provides real-time market data visualization, portfolio tracking, and technical indicators for informed investment decisions.
